role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on Cyrillic script, 'ООО' abbreviation, and place-name etymology ('Клинцы').
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (steppe, arid grass).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed plant biomes (xeric grasses, steppe flora) and native ranges.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road signs (Vienna Convention), markings, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain knowledge (KAMAZ trucks, Soviet infrastructure) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country as Russia. The linguistic agent provided the definitive evidence ('Клинцы'), which the meta and regulatory agents reinforced with infrastructure analysis. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the specific linguistic marker over the generic landscape features shared with Kazakhstan.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately identified Cyrillic text and specific company name.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the flat, arid steppe terrain visible in the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the dry, yellowed grasses typical of the steppe biome.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the circular road sign and utility pole styles.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the KAMAZ truck model and Soviet-style infrastructure.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the ground truth (Russia).
